case_title: WONDWOSSEN MEKBEB VS. ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-31-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-20-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEKBEB, WONDWOSSEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR $3,907.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,967.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MJ FAJARDO--RISK MANAGMENT SUPERVISOR.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-20-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-20-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MJ FAJARDO--RISK MANAGMENT SUPERVISOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE (SC-152) GRANTED, PER JEAN MILEFF, JUDGE PRO TEM.
